title: Mediterranean Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken dish from North Africa, with a blend of citrus and spices.
instructions: Heat the citrusy olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped dates and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the mediterranean spice blend, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the tagine spice blend and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
